name: Cheddar Biscuit Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan with biscuits and press together to seal.
3. In a bowl, combine shredded Cheddar cheese and flour.
4. Add eggs, milk, chopped ham, pimiento, salt, and pepper to the bowl.
5. Stir until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into the biscuit shell.
7. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until set and lightly browned.
